description: baseline
protein default full attention instead of windowed pattern
protein smaller head dim to double attention head count at fixed width
protein replace ReLU-squared MLP with parameter-matched SwiGLU under full attention
protein switch full-attention SwiGLU model to single KV head (MQA)
protein widen full-attention SwiGLU default from 320d to 384d
protein grouped-query attention with half as many KV heads in the widened full-attention SwiGLU model
protein disable learned value embeddings in widened full-attention GQA SwiGLU model
protein use learned value embeddings in every block of the widened full-attention GQA SwiGLU model
protein use one-third KV-head grouped-query attention in the widened full-attention SwiGLU model
protein keep widened full-attention SwiGLU model but raise GQA head count to 8 query heads and 4 KV heads at fixed 384d width
protein reduce widened full-attention GQA SwiGLU FFN multiplier from 5x to 4x
protein enlarge attention head dim from 64 to 96 for 4-query/2-KV GQA at fixed 384d width
protein increase SwiGLU FFN expansion from 5x to 6x in the widened full-attention GQA model
protein tie input and output embeddings in the widened full-attention GQA SwiGLU model
protein deepen full-attention GQA SwiGLU model from 6 to 8 layers at fixed 384d width
protein move learned value embeddings from alternating blocks to the upper half of the widened full-attention GQA SwiGLU model
protein restrict learned value embeddings from the upper half to only the top third of blocks in the widened full-attention GQA SwiGLU model
protein expand learned value embeddings from upper half to upper two-thirds of layers in the widened full-attention GQA SwiGLU model
protein let upper-half value-embedding gates use full hidden state instead of 32-channel slice
